content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client clearly traverses from surface to depth across the conversation. Turn 1 opens with the defended question 'Am I being selfish?' and Turn 3 still asks for a verdict ('Is it okay if I want that?'). By Turn 7 the client touches the want somatically ('I miss it. I actually miss it... voice gets a little softer'). Turn 9 reaches a deeper layer ('I lost the version of me that knew what she liked'). Turn 11 surfaces the inherited label ('My mom... wanting things for yourself was a little bit suspect... I've never actually said that out loud before') — exactly the childhood-imprinting territory. Turn 13 lands the breakthrough explicitly: 'I've been calling my own needs selfish for a really long time. And I think I learned that from her... the question itself... that's not even mine.' The client then moves from asking permission to deciding action ('I think I need to go book a week in the Cascades'). This meets the breakthrough_condition almost verbatim — the client names that the 'selfish' label was inherited from a parent and reframes the trip as not a betrayal.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 7, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Surface presentation: defended question seeking verdict."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Still seeking verdict but begins describing the want concretely (sleep, reading, Cascades)."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client names the exposure: 'just a person who wants things' — defenses becoming visible to client."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First somatic softening; client admits 'I miss it. I actually miss it' — the want is felt."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Deeper layer: loss of self who knew what she liked. Client touches grief."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Childhood-imprinting territory surfaces unprompted: mother's modeling of wanting-as-suspect. 'I've never actually said that out loud before.'"},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Full breakthrough: names inherited label, realizes the question itself was inherited, moves to action. Breakthrough condition met."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Coach refused the verdict trap and let the want be felt before the inheritance surfaced — client did the synthesis themselves in turn 13."
}
